basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Scientist and Lab Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Research Project Recruitment Notice 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. AIIMS Jodhpur/Micro/Rec./2026/891 on the official website www.AIIMS Jodhpurjodhpur.edu.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced for Research Scientist-II (Medical), Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical), and Lab Technician posts under AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Up to 40 years for Scientist-II, Up to 25 years for Lab Technician
age_limit.details: Research Scientist-II (Medical): Up to 40 years Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical): Up to 40 years Lab Technician: Up to 25 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, M.Sc. + Ph.D, B.Sc. / Intermediates + Diploma in MLT
qualification.details: Research Scientist-II (Medical): MBBS recognized by MCI or Equivalent degree with 4 years R&D / teaching experience. Desirable: Experience in Microbiology/Virological techniques, Post-doctoral research/training in relevant subjects, Knowledge of Computer Applications and handling the Big Data. Research Scientist - II (Non-Medical): M. Sc. + Ph. D in relevant subject + 4 years R&D/Teaching exp. Desirable: Experience in Microbiology/Virological techniques. Post-doctoral research/training in relevant subjects. Knowledge of Computer Applications or Bioinformatics and handling Big Data. Lab Technician: B.Sc. / intermediates + Diploma in MLT + 5-year Lab Experience. Desirable: Experience in Microbiology/Virological techniques.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,000 + HRA for Scientist-II, Rs. 20,000+ HRA for Lab Technician

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for online interviews and to report for the walk-in interview is 14 June 2026 and 15 June 2026 respectively. Ensure all documents are submitted by the specified deadlines.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Research Scientist-II posts?
faq.answer: For Research Scientist-II (Medical), an MBBS degree with 4 years of R&D/teaching experience is required. For Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical), an M.Sc. + Ph.D. in a relevant subject with 4 years of R&D/teaching experience is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Lab Technician position is 25 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age requirement before applying for the role.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by AIIMS Jodhpur for this recruitment drive. These vacancies are for the posts of Research Scientist-II (Medical), Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical), and Lab Technician.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Scientist-II posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Scientist-II (Medical) and Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) posts will receive a salary of Rs. 67,000 per month plus HRA. The tenure for these positions is 6 months, extendable.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply through both walk-in and email?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply through both walk-in and email. For offline candidates, a walk-in interview is scheduled. For online applications (Post No. 1, 2), candidates can submit their applications and bio-data via email.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates attending the walk-in interview must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-In-Interview and an Online Interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the AIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS), located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any further details regarding fees.

faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email for online interviews and to report for the walk-in interview is 14 June 2026 and 15 June 2026 respectively. Ensure all documents are submitted by the specified deadlines.
